public_reputation: Caravan medic who can set a bone in motion and still remember every guest-right debt in camp.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a healer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of healer in and around Nomdara relay camps, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Nomdara relay camps workable through the obligations of healer while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Nomdara relay camps, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of healer visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Sema Reedbasin can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Sema Reedbasin can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained.
public_signal: Sema Reedbasin carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Nomdara relay camps: the part of Nomdara relay camps where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
